stemHtml: When a pattern “B” runway-holding position marking is used at an intersection of a taxiway and a precision approach runway, it shall be accompanied by a CAT (1) _____ position sign. This includes (2) _____ text on a (3) _____ background.

options.a: (1) CAT II or CAT III; (2) black; (3) yellow
options.b: (1) CAT I, CAT II or CAT III; (2) yellow; (3) black
options.c: (1) CAT I, CAT II or CAT III; (2) white; (3) red
options.d: (1) CAT I, CAT II, CAT III or CAT IV; (2) red; (3) white
